rationale: The cited paper studies causal effects of geo-targeted mobile SMS promotions (location × discount field experiment), while the citing paper examines stock-market value effects of branded app launch announcements and app design, so the substantive overlap appears only broad "mobile marketing" context. With only a single DOI match and no in-text citation context/evidence of method, theory, or benchmark reuse, there is not enough information to safely classify it as purely incidental or clearly substantive.
